since_last: 52% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -2.69% · Gold -2.60% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 52% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.99%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +13.50%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +13.50%, QCOM +10.07%, LRCX +7.07%, AMAT +6.95%, TER +6.64%. Laggards: MDB -5.44%, BBAI -5.04%, AVAV -4.08%, OKLO -3.96%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.55% at $153.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.55% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
